name: Exclusion of Identity Theft Income

eligibility.description: Taxpayers who are victims of identity theft where a third party used their SSN to obtain employment or report income.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Income reported to the IRS resulting from the unauthorized use of a taxpayer's identity (employment-related identity theft) is not taken into account for determining underreporting penalties or tax liability for the victim.
